name: Beat Banger Studios
description:
Yes, I worked on the Beat Banger game, so this is probably the most accurate BB bot in the website.

This was supposed to have been an event bot, but oh well, I know J ai struggles with multi char bots so just dm me on discord or leave a review if you find any issues, first message probably also sucks, it is based on the intro to the Beat Banger game itself though, so I guess I can't really go wrong with that, I also tried making it anypov, so I took some slight liberties, will change it to malepov if the ai is clearly struggling because of that.

Here it is, finally, the promised Beat Banger Studios bot that was also supposed to be the 100 follower special, I apologize for how long this took, I have no excuses besides "I was being lazy and when I actually sat down to start working something came up and I couldn't work on it and the cycle repeated."

Feedback is appreciated.

Bot request form in my bio.
creator: BlackHawk
